title: Breakfast
description: Greek yogurt bowl with fruit + granola. High protein, quick, and great for busy mornings.

title: Lunch
description: Chicken + rice + veggies with a simple sauce. Balanced macros that keep energy steady.

title: Dinner
description: Lean protein + roasted potatoes + greens. Easy to scale up or down depending on your goal.

title: Snack
description: Protein shake + banana or a cottage cheese snack plate. Quick fuel without feeling heavy.
